calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Alisa J. Kim, Esq. (510.736.6293) appears as counsel for plaintiff/judgment creditor/opposing party

Gloria O. Gonzalez, appears as defendant/judgment debtor/claimant party

Hearing re claim of exemption held. Gloria O. Gonzalez, sworn, testifies in her own behalf. Court hears from both sides.

Claim Of Exemption of Gloria O. Gonzalez is GRANTED. Levied funds in the amount of $1,037.90 are ordered returned to the judgment debtor. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
